## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Release preparation

## Validation

Paste validation output:

```bash
npm run check
node bin/openlag.js --version
npm pack --dry-run
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit secrets or private data.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when needed.
- [ ] I did not modify generated files unnecessarily.
